title: Grinch Christmas 8 Pack 9oz Paper Cups Disposable Party Tableware, Wax Paper Cups (Red)
features: Elevate your holiday celebrations with our Christmas Grinch Disposable Party Tableware, featuring a delightful set of 8 paper cups that capture the whimsical spirit of Dr. Seuss's beloved character.
Each cup showcases vibrant, festive designs that are perfect for serving hot cocoa, holiday punch, or any festive beverage, making them an ideal addition to your Christmas gatherings.
With a capacity of 9oz and measuring 9cm in height, these cups are perfect for adults and children.

Crafted from high-quality materials, these cups are not only sturdy and leak-resistant but also disposable for easy clean up, allowing you to focus on enjoying the festivities rather than worrying about the mess.

Whether you're hosting a family get-together, a children's party, or a cosy winter soirée, these Grinch-themed cups will add a touch of fun and charm to your table setting, ensuring that your holiday spirit is as bright as the season itself.
Make your Christmas celebrations memorable and fun with this charming tableware that captures the spirit of the season!
